feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A09 - W17A10 - W17A11 - W17A14 - W17B08 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 19, 06:00 - 10:00 UTC

Apr 23, 14:13 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A09
- Rack W17A10
- Rack W17A11
- Rack W17A14
- Rack W17B08

Start time : 19/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 19/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Cooling System] - Rack G121A15 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 11, 04:00 - 07:00 UTC

Apr 7, 14:50 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 11/05/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 11/05/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks T01B24/T01B25 migration notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 7, 02:00 - 10:00 UTC

Apr 28, 20:42 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a migration in the racks T01B24/T01B25 to T01B26.

Start time : 07/05/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 07/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in racks T01B24/T01B25 will be unavailable during maintenance for 8 hours.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a migration on our infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack T01B24 migration notification
entry.content:

entry.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack W15A04 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 6, 08:30 - 10:00 UTC

Apr 22, 03:06 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 06/05/2026 08:30 UTC
End time : 06/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [ERI][Network] - Rack E103C07 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 4, 23:30 UTC  -  May 5, 01:30 UTC

Apr 16, 18:27 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 04/05/2026 23:30 UTC
End time : 05/05/2026 01:30 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance, the public network will be unavailable for 10 minutes, after which the vRack network will be unavailable for 10 minutes for the servers in the rack.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will have to carry out interventions on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 45F15 incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 30, 15:41 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers on rack 45F15 has been resolved.

Start time : 30/04/2026 14:32 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 15:28 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 30, 14:58 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack 45F15.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 30/04/2026 14:32 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack 45F15 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX4][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage maintenance notification
entry.content:
Apr 30, 14:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 24, 20:21 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Backup Storage offer.

Start time : 30/04/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, some storage will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 30 minutes.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Backup Storage offering to implement security and performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [ERI1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack E101B04 maintenance notification
entry.content:
Apr 30, 12:04 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Apr 30, 05:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Mar 3, 20:56 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our dedicated servers offer.

Start time : 30/04/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during the maintenance for 90 minutes each.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our infrastructure, we will be relocating the servers currently located in rack E101B04 to rack ERI0102F05A.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack Multiple racks incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 30, 11:55 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers has been resolved.

Start time : 30/04/2026 06:49 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 11:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 30, 07:34 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Most servers are now operational again.
Ongoing Actions : Our team is working to fix the last remaining servers.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 30, 07:00 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks L114A07, L114B13, L114B17, L114B18, L114B19, L115B05, L115B10, L115A14 and L115A17.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 30/04/2026 06:49 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the racksL114A07, L114B13, L114B17, L114B18, L114B19, L115B05, L115B10, L115A14 and L115A17 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack RBX0840G03B incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 28, 16:49 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers on rack RBX0840G03B has been resolved.

Start time : 28/04/2026 14:07 UTC
End time : 28/04/2026 16:48 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 28, 15:20 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack RBX0840G03B.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 28/04/2026 14:07 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the vRack network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via vRack network located in rack RBX0840G03B.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 28, 14:18 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the rack RBX0840G03B.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 28/04/2026 14:07 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the vRack network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via vRack network located in rack RBX0840G03B.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G108B07 incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 28, 09:44 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offer has been resolved.

Start time : 28/04/2026 08:14 UTC
End time : 28/04/2026 09:42 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 28, 08:30 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 28/04/2026 08:14 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack G108B07 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
